Variables.Name: Loop
Variables.Description: Whether the play list should loop (default = true).

Variables.Name: Items
Variables.Description: List of media sources to play.

Functions.Name: Add
Functions.Description: Add a media source to the play list.

Return.Description: true if the media source was added, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: AddFile
Functions.Description: Add a media file path to the play list.

Return.Description: true if the file was added, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: AddUrl
Functions.Description: Add a media URL to the play list.

Return.Description: true if the URL was added, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: Get
Functions.Description: Get the media source at the specified index.

Params.Name: Index
Params.Description: The index of the media source to get.

Return.Description: The media source, or nullptr if the index doesn't exist.

Functions.Name: GetNext
Functions.Description: Get the next media source in the play list.

Params.Name: InOutIndex
Params.Description: Index of the current media source (will contain the new index).

Return.Description: The media source after the current one, or nullptr if the list is empty.

Functions.Name: GetPrevious
Functions.Description: Get the previous media source in the play list.

Params.Name: InOutIndex
Params.Description: Index of the current media source (will contain the new index).

Return.Description: The media source before the current one, or nullptr if the list is empty.

Functions.Name: GetRandom
Functions.Description: Get a random media source in the play list.

Params.Name: OutIndex
Params.Description: Will contain the index of the returned media source.

Return.Description: The random media source, or nullptr if the list is empty.

Functions.Name: Insert
Functions.Description: Insert a media source into the play list at the given position.

Functions.Name: Num
Functions.Description: Get the number of media sources in the play list.

Functions.Name: Remove
Functions.Description: Remove all occurrences of the given media source in the play list.

Return.Description: true if the media source was removed, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: RemoveAt
Functions.Description: Remove the media source at the specified position.

Params.Name: Index
Params.Description: The index of the media source to remove.

Return.Description: true if the media source was removed, false otherwise.

Functions.Name: Replace
Functions.Description: Replace the media source at the specified position.

Params.Name: Index
Params.Description: The index of the media source to replace.

Return.Description: true if the media source was replaced, false otherwise.
